Our next principle of persuasion is liking. We all think we know what liking is, but much like reciprocity, the optimal use of liking requires some subtle practices. You'll recall that the core motives model is ideal for helping you decide which principles to consider first in any persuasion situation. When you have a relationship you need to initiate or build, reciprocity, unity, and liking are the first principles you should look to for opportunities to employ naturally.
